title: Spoonful of Mobs
description: A new tool to eat your enemies!
body:
![Three spoons spinning in the end portal void](https://imgur.com/UizlywV.gif)
## Ever wanted to eat a creeper?, well grab a spoon and have a taste!

- Using a simple iron-made spoon, eat any animal or monster that crosses your path!, though they have to be at least around your size... If you want to eat virtually any creature regardless of its size, then you'll need a bigger spoon!, a comically large one perhaps? (>Comically Large Spoon included in this mod<).
- But beware!, not everything that moves is good for your health, so be careful with what you use your spoon for, maybe as a shovel idk.
- Also, after you inevitably get attached to your spoon, you may want to enchant it!, there's 4 exclusive enchantments for your spoon collection!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Iron Stomach (I - IV): Reduces negative effects for eating bad stuff with your spoon, level 4 completely removes it (Not compatible with Ravenous nor Fast Eater).
  - Fast Eater (I - II): Reduces the eat cooldown of your spoon (Not compatible with Ravenous nor Iron Stomach).
  - Leftover Throw (I): After eating a mob, you are given the ability to throw a leftover projectile based on what you just devoured (Not compatible with Ravenous).
  - Ravenous (I): You can eat mobs even if you are not hungry, but the cooldown for your spoon is dramatically increased as well as the slowness you may get for eating (Not compatible with any other enchantment in this list).

</details>



![Player eats a frog using a spoon](https://imgur.com/AEEwm9H.gif)

## Q: Is this mod supposed to be balanced for survival mode????

- Kinda, is still somewhat of a joke mod, but I did tried to make it feel fair, though the Comically Large Spoon is overpowered, as it should be (PS: It's crafted using 8 nether stars + a regular spoon).

## More Info & Other Details

- You may leave a comment here if you have any question or suggestion.
- Feel free to use any of my mods in your modpacks!
